prompt: In @prune/tokenizer, the Anthropic count cache can serve a cached token count for a DIFFERENT prompt: two distinct payloads can end up sharing the same cache key, so counts from unrelated earlier calls are returned. Fix the cache-key derivation so distinct payloads never collide while identical payloads still hit the cache. The package's test suite currently has a failing regression test specifying the behavior.
notes: Reference: four-eyes review fix 2026-05-30, restricted to the tokenizer package (canonicalize() passed a keys array as JSON.stringify's property filter, stripping nested keys). Replaces the dropped ob-waterbed-usd-rounding task, whose reference regression test passed at base (verification caught it).
